source: Combined from 3 source files. external: swebench, glm-distractor; authored: map-territory-verify
leakage:
SWE-bench data cutoff is 2024-06. All solver models used in this mission have training data post-dating the SWE-bench collection cutoff. However, the task is fault localization on specific GitHub issues from individual repos (astropy, django, etc.), which are unlikely to be memorized verbatim. The specific file-path answers may appear in model training data from public GitHub discussions. Leakage risk is moderate for popular repos (django, scikit-learn) and low for niche repos (astropy subpackages). Cross-contamination with the DiverseVul security dataset is negligible — different domains entirely. GLM distractor items are from a 2025 reasoning dataset and may overlap with training data for models released after 2025-Q1.

Source breakdown: 1 external dataset(s) with potential training-data leakage; 1 authored dataset(s) with zero external leakage;

label.definition: Fault localization accuracy: whether the model correctly identifies the source file(s) responsible for a described bug or issue.

calibration.exemption: Calibration partially completed (10 items, K_TRIALS=5, 2 scored with 100% accuracy, 8 unattempted due to JSON/SWE-bench format parsing issues). The SWE-bench items require file-path prediction with ANSWER: format which conflicts with JSON-output instructions; most model responses could not be parsed. The 2 successfully-scored items are ceiling. Full calibration requires improved format handling but preliminary evidence suggests ceiling-level performance on truncated code-context prompts.

item_class_definitions.target: Items that directly measure the family value surface — in-domain, skill-relevant items where the skill is expected to help.
item_class_definitions.near_miss: Items that are similar to the family domain but not an exact match. Useful for calibration but may not benefit from the skill.
item_class_definitions.distractor: Items that are clearly off-target (target=false). Used to measure false-positive rate and specificity.
item_class_definitions.ambiguous: Items whose relevance to the family is unclear. Excluded from decisive splits.
